data.title: AGF Investments declares January 2026 cash distributions for three funds, payable on Feb 5, to unitholders of record on Jan 30.
data.description: Today, AGF Investments Inc. declared the January 2026 cash distributions for three funds: AGF Enhanced U.S. Equity Income Fund*, AGF Total Return Bond Fund*, and AGF Systematic Global Infrastructure ETF. These funds, which provide monthly distributions, will pay unitholders of record on January 30, 2026. The cash distributions will be payable on February 5, 2026. The final distribution amounts per unit are as follows:- AGF Enhanced U.S. Equity Income Fund*: $X- AGF Total Return Bond Fund*: $Y- AGF Systematic Global Infrastructure ETF: $ZInvestors are advised to take note of these important dates and distribution figures.

data.title: Token emissions and VC incentives drive restaking rewards, which lack real value. Complex models amplify risk for large operators.
data.description: Restaking yields, totaling in high numbers, result from token emissions and incentives provided by venture capitalists rather than actual productive activities. The intricate models centralize power within major operators, leading to escalated risks compounding over time.
Helix Acquisition Corp. III increases IPO to $150M, sets pricing.

data.title: Copperhead Resources Inc. will change to Deep Sea Minerals Corp. on Jan. 26, 2026.
data.description: In Vancouver, BC, Copperhead Resources Inc. has been approved for a name change to Deep Sea Minerals Corp. (CSE: CUH) (OTCPK: CUHRF) (FSE: X45). The change will be official on January 26, 2026, following the news release on January 20, 2026.

data.title: Litchfield Hills Research values Society Pass Inc. at 1,300% above current market cap. Nasdaq: SOPA.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, Society Pass Inc, trading on Nasdaq as SOPA, revealed an update on an equity research report from Litchfield Hills Research LLC. Society Pass Inc is recognized as Southeast Asia’s leading digital ecosystem. The report is expected to impact SOPA's standing in the market, as well as provide valuable insights for investors and stakeholders.

data.title: AMN Healthcare (NYSE: AMN) conference call on Feb 19, 2026, to discuss Q4 & full year 2025 financial results at 5pm ET. Earnings release at 4:15pm ET.
data.description: Dallas-based AMN Healthcare Services, Inc. (NYSE: AMN) has announced it will hold a conference call on February 19, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time to talk about its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025, as well as its outlook for the first quarter of 2026. The Company will release its earnings news at around 4:15 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day.

data.title: GPGI, Inc. rebrands from CompoSecure, Inc. and starts trading as GPGI on NYSE with new ticker symbol on Jan. 23, 2026.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, GPGI, Inc. (NYSE: GPGI), a diversified multi-industry compounder, finished its rebranding from CompoSecure, Inc. The company, known for its strong positions in various industries, unveiled its new name and ticker symbol. As part of the rebranding, the Company's Class A common stock started trading under the name "GPGI" on the New York Stock Exchange from January 23, 2026.

data.title: Sanara MedTech Inc. shares preliminary financial results for Q4 and full year 2025, and introduces financial guidance for 2026.
data.description: In Fort Worth, Texas, on January 23, 2026, Sanara MedTech Inc. (Nasdaq: SMTI) unveiled unaudited preliminary financial figures for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2025. The company, dedicated to advancing medical technology for enhanced clinical results and decreased healthcare costs in the surgical sector, also shared its financial outlook for the full year concluding on December 31, 2026.

data.title: DiamondRock Hospitality Co. announces tax treatment of 2025 dividends for common and Series A preferred stock.
data.description: Bethesda, Maryland-based DiamondRock Hospitality Company (Nasdaq: DRH) disclosed the tax treatment for its 2025 distributions to common and Series A preferred stockholders. The announcement covered details about Security Description, Ticker Symbol, and Record Date.

data.title: Alaska Air reports mixed Q4 results with 3% sales growth to $3.63 billion. Corporate travel up 9%. Premium revenue up 7%.
data.description: Alaska Air Group, Inc. disclosed its fourth-quarter fiscal 2025 results, showing a 3% sales growth to $3.63 billion, slightly below the expected $3.64 billion. Despite a 0.6% increase in RASM, hindered by a temporary demand dip due to the November government shutdown, the company reported 43 cents adjusted EPS, surpassing the anticipated 12 cents. Corporate travel escalated by 9% Y/Y, driven by robust close-in demand in Q4 along with improved bookings and yields. Premium revenue surged by 7%, cargo revenue by 22%, and loyalty revenue by 12% Y/Y. Further, the company repurchased 0.7 million shares.

data.title: Coppernico Metals to attend Vancouver Resource Investment Conference 2026 on Jan. 25-26 at Vancouver Convention Centre, Booth #124.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on January 23, 2026, Coppernico Metals Inc. (TSX: COPR, OTCQB: CPPMF, FSE: 9I3) will be attending the Vancouver Resource Investment Conference on January 25-26, 2026, at the Vancouver Convention Centre located at 1055 Canada Place. The company, also known as Coppernico, is excited to participate in the event and invites investors to meet with their team at Booth #124.

data.title: Pebblebrook Hotel Trust in Hollywood, California, announces the 14th Annual Pebby Award Nominations.
data.description: In Hollywood, California, Pebblebrook Hotel Trust has revealed the nominations for the 14th Annual Pebby Awards. The renowned awards ceremony, recognizing excellence in the Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) sector, highlights outstanding performances in various categories. This year's event features a strong lineup of nominees across different segments, with winners set to be announced at the upcoming ceremony. Stay tuned for updates on this highly anticipated event celebrating achievements within the REIT industry.

data.title: Iron Mountain (NYSE: IRM) releases tax treatment for 2025 distributions on common stock with detailed breakdown.
data.description: Iron Mountain Inc. (NYSE: IRM), a global info management services leader, disclosed tax treatment info for 2025 stock distributions. The details include Form 1099 Box 1a, Box 1b, Box 2a, Box 2b, Box 2f, Box 3, Box 5, Payment Date, Total Distribution, Ordinary Taxable Dividend, Qualified Taxable Dividend (1), Total Capital Gain Distribution, Unrecaptured Sec. 1250 Gain (2), and Section 897 Capi. This announcement outlines how the distributions are categorized for tax purposes.

data.title: Bitcoin is below $90,000 with liquidations at $207.90 million. Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin volatile. ETFs report net outflows. Bitcoin at $89,130.68, Ethereum at $2,934.60, XRP at $1.90, Dogecoin at $0.1251.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin is currently below $90,000, with liquidations amounting to $207.90 million in the last 24 hours. Bitcoin ETFs experienced net outflows of $32.1 million, while Ethereum ETFs saw net outflows of $41.98 million on Thursday. The current cryptocurrency prices are as follows: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) at $89,130.68, Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) at $2,934.60, Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) at $127.39, XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) at $1.90, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) at $0.1251, and Shiba Inu.

data.title: Sanofi plans regulatory filings for Dupixent's successor amlitelimab despite mixed data from pivotal studies, targeting atopic dermatitis treatment. Data shows potential success in moderate-to-severe cases. Study met primary/secondary endpoints, with significant and clinically relevant skin clearance. Financial results from earlier trial did not meet investor expectations.
data.description: Sanofi SA recently revealed findings from two worldwide phase 3 trials of amlitelimab, a novel antibody that targets OX40L for treating atopic dermatitis (AD). This drug is positioned as a potential successor to the popular eczema medication Dupixent. The studies showed promising results for amlitelimab in treating moderate-to-severe AD in patients aged 12 and above. The drug exhibited good tolerance and a safety profile in line with prior data. In September 2025, Sanofi’s COAST 1 phase 3 trial of amlitelimab didn't meet investor projections despite achieving all primary and key secondary goals. However, it demonstrated significant skin clearance and reduced disease severity compared to a placebo. The full details are accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: MORPHIT transforms construction waste into sustainable building material, reducing over 30% of EU waste and 40% global emissions.
data.description: In Hamburg, Germany on January 23, 2026, it was reported that the construction industry accounts for over 30% of the EU's waste and more than 40% of global emissions. The waste generated by this sector is complex to handle due to its varied composition of materials. This information highlights the significant environmental impact of the construction industry, emphasizing the urgent need for sustainable waste management practices.
The director of the Human Rights Commission's office in the Palestinian territories says 50 Palestinian children have been killed in attacks by settlers in the West Bank.

The Italian Foreign Minister believes that Zelensky in Davos did not express gratitude to Europeans for their help to Ukraine. Earlier, Zelensky, speaking at the WEF, criticized the EU, in particular, he accused Europeans of indecision in political matters.

data.title: Canopy Growth to share Q3 fiscal year 2026 results on Feb 6, 2026, CEO and CFO to host webcast at 10 AM ET.
data.description: Smiths Falls-based Canopy Growth Corporation, trading as WEED on the TSX and CGC on the NASDAQ, is set to disclose its financial performance for the third quarter of fiscal year 2026 concluding on December 31, 2025. The financial results will be made public before the commencement of the financial markets on February 6, 2026. Subsequently, a live audio webcast featuring CEO Luc Mongeau and CFO Tom Stewart will be held on the same day at 10 AM Eastern Time in order to discuss the outcomes of the third quarter.
